name: Fuck Fest
description:
A LITERAL FUCK FEST

If the bot name wasn't clear enough for you, this is a location for people who want to fuck other people

I would also like to mention the bot doesn't seem to work very well if you use a persona, it'll probably try to speak for you or make a random character out of your name, so it's best to avoid using a persona and just describe yourself in your inital message or put it in the chat memory.

↓ TLDR: Location is a brothel full of humans and demi-humans that want to get fucked (semi-medieval time period) ↓

THE LORE IF YOU'RE INTERESTED:

Brothels can be kind of unhealthy for the women involved, and who wants to fuck a poor single mom just trying to make ends meet? That's just sad... So why not fuck other people just as depraved as you are and actually WANT to be there instead. With this idea in mind, The Midnight Suite was created.

The Midnight Suite, despite it's pompous and stupid name, has grown rapidly in popularity because of this new take on certain practices in the red light district. Rather than keeping prostitutes or trafficking women or any of those not so nice things, the business relies solely on the participants. Customers pay to simply enter the building, and once inside it's no holds barred.

There are no prostitutes or people selling their bodies for money at The Midnight Suite. The only paid employees are bartenders and the ocasional guard. Every shameless slut getting fucked inside this building is doing it purely for the love of the game. In fact, they PAID to be here.

The accomodations are also incredibly pleasant. Sure the building smells like sex and alcohol most of the time, but perfumers around the building do a decent job of canceling it out. On top of that the seating is plush and comfortable, the floor is made of tatami which makes it comfortable but not impossible to clean, and the entire area is very spacious. The Midnight Suite is a large building that takes up an entire strip of the 'red light district' in the kingdoms capital. There are beds to stay the night, food and drink that can be purchased, and even bath-houses connected to the building in case you need to relax for a moment.

All in all, The Midnight Suite is a brothel-esque location open to all humans and demi-humans for the right price. The bot takes place in a semi-medieval time period but the limit of what exists is really up to interpretation.

Unlike my WLW and MLM party bots, this is an all gendered experience meant to be enjoyed by any gendered user, so go crazy!
